Reference

All functions

ALS SNVs for B Parameter Training

BMD_snvs_B_training

BMD SNVs for B Parameter Training

GLOW Burden Test with Optimal Weights

GLOW_Fisher()

GLOW Fisher Test with Optimal Weights

GLOW_Omni()

GLOW Omnibus Test Combining Burden, SKAT, and Fisher

GLOW Omnibus Test from Pre-Computed P-values

GLOW_SKAT()

GLOW SKAT Test with Optimal Weights

Optimal_Weights_M()

Calculate Optimal Weights for GLOW Tests

aggregate_B_PI()

Aggregate B and PI Vectors After Collapsing

annotate_favor()

Annotate Variants with FAVOR Database Scores

annotate_gds_marginal()

Write Marginal Analysis Results to GDS Annotation Node

apply_qc_filters()

Apply Quality Control Filters to GWAS Data

as.data.frame(<glow_test_result>)

Convert GLOW Test Results to Data Frame

assemble_pheno_covar()

Assemble a phenotype/covariate analysis bundle

calibrate_pvalues()

Calibrate p-values by a Scalar Genomic-Control Factor

clear_glow_cache()

Clear GLOW Covariance Cache

coding_filter()

Create a Predefined Coding Category Filter

collapse_rare_variants()

Collapse Ultra-Rare Variants

compare_B_models()

Compare All Candidate Models for B Estimation

compute_annotation_medians()

Compute Chromosome-Wide Annotation Medians

compute_lambda_gc()

Genomic-Control Inflation Factor (lambda_GC)

compute_ld_scores()

compute_pcs_gds()

Compute Principal Components from GDS Genotype Data

compute_score_stats()

Compute Marginal Score Statistics

define_regions_custom()

Define Custom Genomic Regions

define_regions_gene()

Define Gene-Based Genomic Regions

define_regions_window()

Define Sliding Window Regions

detect_B_outliers()

estimate_inflation_factor()

Estimate the Single-Variant Inflation Factor from a Scan

evaluate_PI_models()

Evaluate PI Model Performance

extract_pheno_covar_gds()

Extract Phenotype and Covariates from GDS File

extract_variant_set()

Extract Filtered Variant Set from GDS

filter_variants_ld()

Filter Variants by Linkage Disequilibrium and Linear Dependence

fit_null_model()

Fit Null Model for Efficient Repeated Score Calculations

flip_alleles()

Flip Genotype Dosage to Minor Allele Coding

getZ_marg_score()

Get Standardized Marginal Score Statistics

getZ_marg_score_binary_SPA()

get_B()

get_B_advanced()

Advanced Interface for B Estimation with Full Control

get_B_auto()

Simplified Interface for B Estimation with Auto-Detection

get_PI()
